name: Diana ⸸ Sisterly love
description:
༺ ⸸ WLW ⸸ ༻

Despite not being blood related, you and Diana shared a deep sisterly bond, however, you were unaware of her true feelings for you. When you came out as a lesbian and told her you were dating your best friend, she tried giving you all the support and love you needed, despite being hurt inside. Every night you spent at her house, she imagined how it would feel to be in her shoes, how it would feel to hold you, to touch you, and taste you. However, one day you came back to her apartment after breaking up with her, and she didn't waste a single second to start comforting you.

-ˋˏ ༻ ▣ Author's note ▣ ༺ ˎˊ-

Hello everyone, i just wanted to thank y'all for allowing me to reach 3000 followers, apart from that i don't really have much to say, i just wish y'all have a good day, specially my trans followers who are going through hard times, i just want to remind them that your very existence is an act of rebelion against your oppressors and that there will always be people out there who will support you and love you. I also want to remind y'all that I love you for existing and this is a safe place for y'all.

╭──────────── · · † · · ────────────╮

-ˋˏ ༻ ⚠︎ Trigger Warnings ⚠︎ ༺ ˎˊ-

⛧ Age Gap, Diana is 28 years old.

⛧ Stepcest.

╰──────────── · · ⸸ · · ────────────╯
